title: Remove UnrolledUtilities and Adapt as direct dependencies

title: lateral flow defaults to false in energy hydrology

body:
`@generate_error_functions` was not a great macro: it required adding new names to a line every time a diagnostic is added, it was dealing with several variables at the same time, and could not be used outside of its scope of definition and/or called twice.

`@with_error` accomplishes a the same goals as
`@generate_error_functions` without the problems. The only difference is that now `compute` functions have to be decorated.
title: Add @with_error, remove @generate_error_functions

body: ClimaDiagnostics 0.2.4 introduces a new schedule to use actual months when computing reductions. This commit switches to using that when monthly reducitons are requested.
title: Switch to actual monthly means

body:
## Purpose 
In global runs (spherical shell domain), the depth is used to compute TOPMODEL runoff. When we carry out regional simulations (hydrid box domain), we also require the depth, then. However, we were accessing the depth of the domain in a manner specific to the spherical shell.

This generalizes and stores the depth in domain.fields. I added a column method for completeness, even though we may not need it.


## To-do
